.!..

UNITED NATIONS - ORGANISATION DES NATIONS UNIES

No. 29875

CERTIFICATE of REGISTRATION

The SECRETARY-GENERAL of the UNITED NATIONS hereby certifies that

the following

registered

Secretarter an accordance witn

Article 102

the Charter of

the United Nations:

CERTIFICAT d'ENREGISTREMENT

Le SECRETAIRE GENERAL de 'ORGANISATION des NATIONS UNIES

No. 21841. FRANCE AND TOGO:

Legal Convention. Signed at Lomé on 23 March 1976

Registered by France on 12 April, 1983.

NO 21841. FRANCE ET TOGO :

Convention judiciatre. Signée a Lomé le 23 mars 1976

Enregistrée par la France le 12 avril 1983.

UNITED NATIONS

Le Conseiller juridique:

Done at

New York on 11 November 1986{

For the

SECRETARY-GENERAL

Fait à New York le 11 novembre 1986

Pour le SECRETAIRE GENERAL

The Legal Coursel

SATON DES

UNIES

•NATIONS
